all.en: This excerpt covers the core visual and verbal elements of our brand identity.
all.zh: 本摘錄涵蓋我們品牌識別的核心視覺與語言元素。

all.en: Consistent application of these standards builds recognition and trust over time.
all.zh: 一致地套用這些標準能隨時間建立辨識度與信任感。

all.en: The primary logo must always appear with sufficient clear space around it.
all.zh: 主標誌必須一律保留充足的周邊留白空間。

all.en: Minimum logo size on print materials is twenty millimeters in width.
all.zh: 印刷物上的最小標誌尺寸為寬二十毫米。

all.en: Digital placement requires a minimum width of eighty pixels for clarity.
all.zh: 數位露出為求清晰度需至少八十像素寬。

all.en: Never stretch, rotate, or change the color of the official logo.
all.zh: 切勿拉伸、旋轉或變更官方標誌的顏色。

all.en: Our primary brand color is deep teal with the hex code zero zero five seven six six.
all.zh: 我們的主要品牌色為深青色，色碼為零零五七六六。

all.en: The secondary palette includes warm coral, soft cream, and charcoal gray.
all.zh: 次要色盤包含暖珊瑚色、柔奶油色與炭灰色。

all.en: Accent colors should be used sparingly to highlight key information.
all.zh: 點綴色應節制使用以凸顯關鍵資訊。

all.en: Our heading typeface is Modern Serif Pro used in bold weight.
all.zh: 我們的標題字體為 Modern Serif Pro 並使用粗體字重。

all.en: Body copy should always be set in Open Sans regular at fourteen point.
all.zh: 內文文字應一律使用 Open Sans Regular 十四點字級。

all.en: Line height should be one point five times the font size for readability.
all.zh: 行高應為字級的一點五倍以提升可讀性。

all.en: Our brand voice is warm, knowledgeable, and quietly confident.
all.zh: 我們的品牌語調溫暖、博學且沉穩自信。

all.en: Avoid jargon and write at an eighth grade reading level where possible.
all.zh: 避免行話且儘可能以八年級閱讀程度撰寫。

all.en: Headlines should be short, active, and benefit oriented for the reader.
all.zh: 標題應簡短、主動且以對讀者的好處為導向。

all.en: Photography style favors natural light and authentic candid moments.
all.zh: 攝影風格偏好自然光與真實不擺拍的瞬間。

all.en: Avoid heavily staged stock images that feel generic or impersonal.
all.zh: 避免過度擺拍且感覺通用或冷漠的素材庫照片。

all.en: Iconography uses a consistent two pixel stroke with rounded corners.
all.zh: 圖示系統使用一致的兩像素線條搭配圓角。

all.en: All icons should be available in solid and outline variants.
all.zh: 所有圖示皆應提供實心與線框兩種版本。

all.en: Maintain at least an eight pixel grid for spacing in digital layouts.
all.zh: 數位版面間距至少維持八像素的網格。

all.en: Accessibility requires a minimum color contrast ratio of four point five to one.
all.zh: 無障礙要求顏色對比度至少達四點五比一。

all.en: Always include descriptive alt text for every meaningful image asset.
all.zh: 務必為每張有意義的圖像素材附上描述性替代文字。

all.en: Questions about brand application should be directed to the design operations team.
all.zh: 有關品牌應用的問題請洽詢設計營運團隊。

all.en: The full style guide is available on the internal brand portal at any time.
all.zh: 完整風格指南隨時可於內部品牌入口網站取得。

all.en: Quarterly reviews ensure the guidelines remain current with evolving market trends.
all.zh: 季度檢視確保準則能持續契合不斷演變的市場趨勢。

all.en: Vendors and freelancers must sign an agreement to follow these standards.
all.zh: 外部廠商與自由工作者必須簽署協議以遵循這些標準。

all.en: A downloadable asset kit contains logos, color swatches, and font files.
all.zh: 可下載的素材套件包含標誌、色票與字型檔案。

all.en: Templates for common materials are available to speed up routine production.
all.zh: 常用素材的範本已備妥以加速日常製作流程。

all.en: Any deviation from these standards requires written approval from brand leadership.
all.zh: 任何偏離這些標準的情況皆須取得品牌主管的書面核准。

all.en: Onboarding sessions for new hires include a brand fundamentals workshop.
all.zh: 新進人員的到職訓練包含一場品牌基礎工作坊。

all.en: Annual training keeps long tenured staff aligned with the latest updates.
all.zh: 年度訓練讓資深員工持續對齊最新更新。

all.en: Feedback channels are open for suggestions that could strengthen the guidelines.
all.zh: 意見回饋管道開放接受可強化準則的建議。

all.en: Trademark counsel reviews any new visual element before official adoption.
all.zh: 商標法律顧問會在任何新視覺元素正式採用前進行審查。

all.en: Together these standards protect the value we have built in our brand.
all.zh: 這些標準共同守護我們在品牌上所累積的價值。

all.en: Internal champions will help promote consistent adoption across departments.
all.zh: 內部推廣大使將協助於各部門推動一致的採用率。

all.en: A digital asset library is maintained on the cloud for easy global access.
all.zh: 雲端維護有數位素材庫以便全球便利存取。

all.en: Naming conventions ensure that every file is easy to locate and reuse.
all.zh: 命名規範確保每個檔案皆易於尋找並重複使用。

all.en: Sub brands must request approval before introducing visual variations.
all.zh: 子品牌於引入視覺變化前必須提出申請取得核准。

all.en: Campaign extensions should layer on top of, not replace, the master identity.
all.zh: 活動延伸應加疊於主識別之上，而非取代主識別。

all.en: Co branded materials require dual approval from both parties brand teams.
all.zh: 聯名素材需取得雙方品牌團隊的雙重核准。

all.en: Annual brand audits measure consistency across markets and touchpoints.
all.zh: 年度品牌稽核衡量跨市場與接觸點的一致性。

all.en: Inclusive language guidance is updated regularly to reflect best practices.
all.zh: 包容性語言指引定期更新以反映最佳實務。

all.en: Sound design and motion principles are documented in a supplementary guide.
all.zh: 聲音設計與動態原則記錄於補充版指引中。

all.en: Questions and improvement ideas can be submitted through the brand inbox.
all.zh: 問題與改善建議可透過品牌信箱提交。
